skills.name: content-search
skills.description: Search and retrieve Visa2AU blog posts via the site's public, unauthenticated MCP server (search_posts and get_post tools).

skills.name: content-api
skills.description: Access the OAuth 2.0 client-credentials protected content API (token flow, /api/content usage) for authenticated blog content retrieval.

skills.name: markdown-access
skills.description: Get any page as markdown via Accept: text/markdown content negotiation or direct .md URLs — no authentication.
